report.title: Checkout promo flow

confidence.reason: Sample narrative; real UAT would cite ticket + branch

understanding: Release slice: promo code on checkout review behind feature flag checkout.promo_v2.
Users validate codes, see adjusted totals, complete payment; finance receives promo_id on order.
Existing coverage: API contract tests for validation; one Playwright happy apply path.

gaps.text: Flag default in production vs staging for UAT window
Rollback plan if over-discount: flag off only vs purge in-flight carts

risks.title: Payment amount ≠ server total after promo apply
risks.mitigation: Block pay until server confirms total hash

risks.title: Partial flag rollout leaves CDN-cached checkout JS on old bundle
risks.mitigation: Versioned asset URL; verify cache headers in UAT

questions: GO criteria: all P0 scenarios green in staging + one prod smoke at 1%?

scenarios.name: Flag off
scenarios.exploration: Load checkout with flag disabled; confirm legacy path unchanged

scenarios.name: Flag on — happy path
scenarios.exploration: Valid code, test card pay; compare order promo_id in admin

scenarios.name: Flag on — invalid code
scenarios.exploration: Error UX and cart total unchanged

scenarios.name: Staging → prod config drift
scenarios.exploration: Compare validation API base URL and promo rule version

evidence.text: Assumed: staging mirrors prod promo catalog within 15 minutes

automation.note: Add Playwright invalid code + back-navigation before prod smoke
Nightly contract suite against staging promo rules export

nonfunctional.performance: Validation p95 within 200ms under UAT load script
nonfunctional.observability: Dashboard for promo_validation_failed rate during UAT week

modeOutput.content: UAT execution plan: (1) flag-off sanity, (2) API contract suite in staging, (3) exploratory rows 2–4 timeboxed, (4) prod smoke at 1%. Release risks: CDN cache, concurrent limits, payment total mismatch.

coverageGaps.text: Exploratory rows 3–4 not in CI today
No automated flag-off regression in pipeline

goNoGo.reason: Proceed if P0 happy path passes in staging and observability dashboard is wired; defer prod % until finance spot-check signed
